# Sleeve Promotion Notes

Generated: 2026-04-20

## Key rule
Do not assume every HUMAN-facing sleeve summary is a machine-facing public JSON sleeve.

## Why
The public lane is being improved in two parallel ways:
1. machine-facing disciplined sleeve promotion
2. HUMAN-facing explanatory clarity

Those should inform each other, but they do not always advance at the same speed.

## Current safe interpretation
- HUMAN entries are valid explanations of sleeve role/category
- machine-facing JSON sleeves should remain a smaller curated set until stronger structured promotions are ready

## Public machine-facing sleeve lane remains intentionally disciplined
Current kept machine-facing public sleeves:
- `slv-operator`
- `sample-basic-minimal`
- `neomagnetar-dynamic-persona-v1`

Removed from current machine-facing public lane:
- `stage5-sleeve`

## Quality direction
Improve public quality by:
- making HUMAN docs clearer
- classifying sleeves honestly
- promoting only real machine-facing sleeves when the structured source is strong enough
- avoiding fake JSON sleeves made from prose-only materials
